parameters.jsonExample: {"tenant": {"business_id": "uuid-here", "order_id": "CUST_260606_001", "business_name": "مطعم السدة", "plan_id": "business", "instance_name": "arq-cust-260606-001"}, "customer_id": "201234567890", "customer_name": "محمد", "customer_phone": "201234567890", "customer_message": "السلام عليكم", "ai_response": "أهلاً بك يا محمد", "intent": "general", "intent_confidence": 0.85, "sentiment_score": 0, "sentiment_label": "Neutral", "escalated": false, "response_time_sec": 2, "input_tokens": 1200, "output_tokens": 50, "cost_egp": 0.18, "model_used": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5", "conversation_id": ""}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.conversation_id, business_id: $json.business_id, customer_id: $json.customer_id, status: $json.escalated ? 'escalated' : 'open', last_message_at: $json.created_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.business_id, conversation_id: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.conversation_id, customer_id: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.customer_id, customer_name: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.customer_name, customer_phone: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.customer_phone, customer_message: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.customer_message, ai_response: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.ai_response, intent: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.intent, intent_confidence: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.intent_confidence, sentiment_score: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.sentiment_score, sentiment_label: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.sentiment_label, escalated: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.escalated, response_time_sec: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.response_time_sec, input_tokens: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.input_tokens, output_tokens: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.output_tokens, cost_egp: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.cost_egp, model_used: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.model_used, channel: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.channel, created_at: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.created_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ p_business_id: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.business_id, p_messages_delta: 1, p_tokens_in_delta: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.input_tokens, p_tokens_out_delta: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.output_tokens, p_cost_egp_delta: $('LOG_CONV_PREPARE').item.json.cost_egp }) }}

meta.description: Logs each conversation turn to Supabase messages + conversations tables. Increments usage_counters via increment_usage RPC. Replaces Google Sheets APPEND_CONVERSATION.
